reviews.review_description: Fun game with a lot of potential. I like how you have to look at the spell scroll and memorize the order of buttons to press in order to cast spells. Excited to see what the next update is gonna be!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are also excited for where this game is headed, but we are of course a little partial! Check back weekly for new updates!

reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential. The maze is fun and challenging to get through. There’s utility spells that help you get through the maze, avoiding traps or destroying a wall to make a new path. Can’t wait for the maze generator feature! Awesome little game you can just spend hours playing without realizing.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! With weekly updates we hope to keep you coming back for more of the maze!

reviews.review_description: This game really is a lot of fun! It's an early look, but a heck of a lot of fun to play!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Check back weekly for new and improved features!

reviews.review_description: Super fun, pretty scary (nothing crazy, just jumpy when random guys pop out). We've been addicted to this game for the past few days and just beat the last level (please make more!). So fun and would love to see this continue. What a great concept. My favorite game on the quest so far. One moment your traversing the maze dodging obstacles, the next an eerie man with a staff is shooting red balls at you. Will you escape?
